import _objectSpread from"C:/Users/Dell/Documents/trae_projects/yourfinance/frontend/node_modules/@babel/runtime/helpers/esm/objectSpread2.js";// Metals API Service using Alpha Vantage (free tier)
// You'll need to get an API key from https://www.alphavantage.co/
const API_KEY=process.env.REACT_APP_ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY||'demo';const BASE_URL='https://www.alphavantage.co/query';// Fallback mock data in case API fails or for development
export const mockMetalsData={gold:{symbol:'XAU/USD',price:2150.75,change:52.25,changePercent:2.49,lastUpdated:new Date().toISOString()},silver:{symbol:'XAG/USD',price:25.80,change:0.31,changePercent:1.22,lastUpdated:new Date().toISOString()},timestamp:Date.now()};export const fetchLiveMetalsPrices=async()=>{try{// Alpha Vantage endpoint for gold and silver
const goldUrl="".concat(BASE_URL,"?function=GLOBAL_QUOTE&symbol=GC=F&apikey=").concat(API_KEY);const silverUrl="".concat(BASE_URL,"?function=GLOBAL_QUOTE&symbol=SI=F&apikey=").concat(API_KEY);const[goldResponse,silverResponse]=await Promise.all([fetch(goldUrl),fetch(silverUrl)]);if(!goldResponse.ok||!silverResponse.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch metals data');}const goldData=await goldResponse.json();const silverData=await silverResponse.json();// Extract prices from Alpha Vantage response
const goldPrice=parseFloat(goldData['Global Quote']['05. price']);const goldChange=parseFloat(goldData['Global Quote']['09. change']);const goldChangePercent=parseFloat(goldData['Global Quote']['10. change percent'].replace('%',''));const silverPrice=parseFloat(silverData['Global Quote']['05. price']);const silverChange=parseFloat(silverData['Global Quote']['09. change']);const silverChangePercent=parseFloat(silverData['Global Quote']['10. change percent'].replace('%',''));return{gold:{symbol:'GC=F',price:goldPrice,change:goldChange,changePercent:goldChangePercent,lastUpdated:new Date().toISOString()},silver:{symbol:'SI=F',price:silverPrice,change:silverChange,changePercent:silverChangePercent,lastUpdated:new Date().toISOString()},timestamp:Date.now()};}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching metals prices:',error);// Return mock data with slight random variations for demo
const mockData=_objectSpread({},mockMetalsData);mockData.gold.price+=(Math.random()-0.5)*10;mockData.gold.change=mockData.gold.price-2150.75;mockData.silver.price+=(Math.random()-0.5)*0.5;mockData.silver.change=mockData.silver.price-25.80;mockData.timestamp=Date.now();return mockData;}};// Calculate linear regression and correlation
export const calculateCorrelation=(goldPrices,silverPrices)=>{const n=goldPrices.length;// Handle cases where we don't have enough data
if(n<2){return{goldPrices,silverPrices,dates:[],correlation:0,rSquared:0,regressionSlope:0,regressionIntercept:0};}// Calculate means
const goldMean=goldPrices.reduce((sum,price)=>sum+price,0)/n;const silverMean=silverPrices.reduce((sum,price)=>sum+price,0)/n;// Calculate covariance and variances
let covariance=0;let goldVariance=0;let silverVariance=0;for(let i=0;i<n;i++){covariance+=(goldPrices[i]-goldMean)*(silverPrices[i]-silverMean);goldVariance+=Math.pow(goldPrices[i]-goldMean,2);silverVariance+=Math.pow(silverPrices[i]-silverMean,2);}covariance/=n;goldVariance/=n;silverVariance/=n;// Calculate correlation (handle division by zero)
const correlation=goldVariance*silverVariance===0?0:covariance/Math.sqrt(goldVariance*silverVariance);// Calculate regression line (y = mx + b)
const regressionSlope=goldVariance===0?0:covariance/goldVariance;const regressionIntercept=silverMean-regressionSlope*goldMean;// Calculate R-squared
const rSquared=Math.pow(correlation,2);return{goldPrices,silverPrices,dates:[],correlation,rSquared,regressionSlope,regressionIntercept};};// Fetch historical data for charts
export const fetchHistoricalData=async()=>{try{// Alpha Vantage historical data endpoints
const goldHistoryUrl="".concat(BASE_URL,"?function=TIME_SERIES_DAILY&symbol=GC=F&outputsize=compact&apikey=").concat(API_KEY);const silverHistoryUrl="".concat(BASE_URL,"?function=TIME_SERIES_DAILY&symbol=SI=F&outputsize=compact&apikey=").concat(API_KEY);const[goldResponse,silverResponse]=await Promise.all([fetch(goldHistoryUrl),fetch(silverHistoryUrl)]);if(!goldResponse.ok||!silverResponse.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch historical data');}const goldData=await goldResponse.json();const silverData=await silverResponse.json();// Extract time series data
const goldTimeSeries=goldData['Time Series (Daily)']||{};const silverTimeSeries=silverData['Time Series (Daily)']||{};// Get common dates (last 252 trading days ~ 1 year)
const dates=Object.keys(goldTimeSeries).slice(0,252);const goldHistory=[];const silverHistory=[];const goldPrices=[];const silverPrices=[];dates.forEach(date=>{if(goldTimeSeries[date]&&silverTimeSeries[date]){const goldPrice=parseFloat(goldTimeSeries[date]['4. close']);const silverPrice=parseFloat(silverTimeSeries[date]['4. close']);goldHistory.push({date,price:goldPrice});silverHistory.push({date,price:silverPrice});goldPrices.push(goldPrice);silverPrices.push(silverPrice);}});// Calculate correlation and regression
const correlationData=calculateCorrelation(goldPrices,silverPrices);correlationData.dates=dates;return{goldHistory,silverHistory,correlation:correlationData,lastUpdated:new Date().toISOString()};}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching historical data:',error);console.log('Falling back to mock historical data...');// Generate mock historical data for demo
const mockData=generateMockHistoricalData();console.log('Mock data generated:',{goldPoints:mockData.goldHistory.length,silverPoints:mockData.silverHistory.length,correlation:mockData.correlation.correlation,sampleSize:mockData.correlation.goldPrices.length});return mockData;}};// Generate mock historical data for demo purposes
const generateMockHistoricalData=()=>{const dates=[];const goldHistory=[];const silverHistory=[];const goldPrices=[];const silverPrices=[];const today=new Date();const baseGoldPrice=1800+Math.random()*400;const baseSilverPrice=20+Math.random()*10;// Generate 252 days of data (1 year of trading days)
for(let i=252;i>=0;i--){const date=new Date(today);date.setDate(date.getDate()-i);if(date.getDay()!==0&&date.getDay()!==6){// Skip weekends
const dateStr=date.toISOString().split('T')[0];// Simulate price movements with some correlation
const goldPrice=baseGoldPrice+(Math.random()-0.5)*100+i*0.5;const silverPrice=baseSilverPrice+(Math.random()-0.5)*2+i*0.05;dates.push(dateStr);goldHistory.push({date:dateStr,price:goldPrice});silverHistory.push({date:dateStr,price:silverPrice});goldPrices.push(goldPrice);silverPrices.push(silverPrice);}}const correlationData=calculateCorrelation(goldPrices,silverPrices);correlationData.dates=dates;return{goldHistory,silverHistory,correlation:correlationData,lastUpdated:new Date().toISOString()};};export const subscribeToMetalsUpdates=function(callback){let interval=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:30000;let isSubscribed=true;const fetchAndUpdate=async()=>{if(!isSubscribed)return;try{const data=await fetchLiveMetalsPrices();if(isSubscribed){callback(data);}}catch(error){console.error('Error in metals subscription:',error);}};// Initial fetch
fetchAndUpdate();// Set up interval
const intervalId=setInterval(fetchAndUpdate,interval);// Cleanup function
return()=>{isSubscribed=false;clearInterval(intervalId);};};
